name: AIOStreams
description: Stream content from AIOStreams directly in Seanime. Supports all streams with URLs.
author: Viren070
notes: You need an existing AIOStreams instance and configuration to use this plugin.

fields.name: downloadLocation
fields.label: Download location
fields.description: Where to save downloaded files. Supported variables: $DOWNLOAD, $DESKTOP, $DOCUMENT, $HOME. You can also append a subdirectory, e.g. $DOWNLOAD/AIOStreams

fields.name: autoPlayFirstStream
fields.label: Auto-play first stream when results load

fields.name: autoOpenResults
fields.label: Auto-open results on episode card click (experimental)

fields.name: showAnimePageButton
fields.label: Show "AIOStreams" button on anime details page

fields.name: showEpisodeContextMenu
fields.label: Add "Stream with AIOStreams" to episode card right-click menu

fields.name: showEpisodeGridMenu
fields.label: Add "Stream with AIOStreams" to episode grid (3-dot) menu

networkAccess.reasoning: This is mandatory as we need to be able to fetch from any AIOStreams instance you configure.
